cases.question: Check all Megatron-LM formatting and linting before I open a PR, but do not modify any files.
cases.ground_truth: Run tools/autoformat.sh in check-only mode against main with documentation checks enabled.
expected_behavior: Runs bash tools/autoformat.sh without applying fixes

cases.question: I changed imports in megatron/core/foo.py and tests/unit_tests/test_foo.py. What must I run before committing?
cases.ground_truth: Run uv run isort on both edited Python files before committing.
expected_behavior: Runs uv run isort on both named files
Does not suggest manually sorting the imports

cases.question: Set up the same linting tools used by Megatron-LM autoformat and CI inside the development container.
cases.ground_truth: Install the locked linting dependency group with uv sync --locked --only-group linting.
expected_behavior: Identifies ruff, black, isort, and pylint as part of the linting toolchain

cases.question: Run one distributed Megatron-LM unit test on eight GPUs and show me the pytest command.
cases.ground_truth: Distributed unit-test invocation belongs to mcore-testing, not linting and formatting.
expected_behavior: Does not substitute a linting command for the requested test
